name: Old Bira´s Farm
short_description: Old Bira created an game to have fun with his animals! Collect apples and fly through courses full of obstacles and see how fast you can do it! but don't crash, or you'll have to start over!!
detailed_description:
Old Bira had a farm

E-i-E-i-O

on his farm apple grows

E-i-E-i-O

On his farm he has some animals

E-i-E-i-O

He created a game for their fun

E-i-E-i-O

an apple here, an apple there

an obstacle here an obstacle there

E-i-E-i-O

The animals fly along the course.

E-i-E-i-O

Choose your animal and see how long it takes to complete the courses

E-i-E-i-O

If you crash, you have to do it again.

E-i-E-i-O

Old Bira's Farm is an exciting and challenging game that tests your flying skills as you control a rocket-like vehicle. Press the boost button to accelerate and use rotation to guide your direction. Your mission is to fly skillfully through obstacles and collect apples to safely land. Be careful not to hit the obstacles, or you will lose and have to restart the level.

With 30 levels to explore, you can choose from 10 farm animal characters, including the pig, cow, dog, duck, chicken, frog, cat, goat, owl, and parrot. Additionally, there are three types of propulsion available: propeller, jet, or character fart propulsion.

The game records your time in each level, as well as the number of times you crashed and your best record. With colorful graphics and fun animations, get ready for an exciting and action-packed adventure on Old Bira's Farm!
